数時間後、ヒナギはようやく意識を取り戻した。<br>すっかり回復した様子ではある:
A few hours later, Hinagi regained consciousness. She seemed to have
fully recovered, but I decided to escort her to the dormitory—
あ、あの、本当にありがとうございました。<br>司令官様が駆け付けてくれなかった:
Ah, um, thank you very much, Commander. If you had not come rushing
to help, my life would have been...
いや、命を救われたのは俺も同じだからな。<br>ヒナギが前線基地にいてくれなかっ:
No, you saved my life too. When I think about what would have
happened if you hadn't been at the Frontline Base, I shudder.
それはお世辞でもなんでもない。陰陽師である彼女がいなかったら、<br>にわか仕込:
That was no flattery at all. Without her, the Onmyoji, I might have
died, my body eroded by that hastily prepared curse.
私も、司令官様にお仕えできてとても幸せです……: I am also very happy to serve you, Commander...
ヒナギはそう言って頬を染める。: Hinagi said that, her cheeks flushing.
……あ、あの、１つだけ、お願いしてもよろしいでしょうか？: ...Ah, um, may I ask one favor?
ん？ お願い？<br>あぁ。俺にできることなら別にいいが。:
Hm? A favor?
Ah, if it's something I can do, sure.
えっと……よろしければ、手を繋いで……もらえませんか？: Well... if you do not mind, could you hold my hand?
手？<br>え～と、それだけでいいのか？:
Hand?
Uh, is that all you want?
<user>はヒナギの要求通りにそっと手を握る。<br>その手はとても小さく、そ:
I gently took her hand as she requested.
It was very small and soft.
ん？ 顔、真っ赤だそ。大丈夫か？<br>また変な気の流れになっちゃったとかじゃな:
Hm? Your face is bright red.
You okay?
You haven't gotten that weird ki flow again, have you?
こ、これは違います！<br>ぜ、全然、いい気の流れです！:
Th-this is different!
It is—it is a perfectly good flow of ki!
ヒナギは平然とした顔を保とうとするが、心臓の鼓動が高鳴り、<br>それが繋いだ手:
Hinagi tried to keep a composed face, but her heart pounded, and she
worried that he might feel it through their joined hands.
（いい気の流れに決まっているじゃないですか……<br>だって、大好きな人と手を繋:
(Of course it is a good flow of ki... because I am holding hands with
the person I love...)
ヒナギと手をつないだまま、前線基地内の大通りを宿舎に向かって歩いていく。:
Still holding hands with Hinagi, we walked down the Main Street of the
Frontline Base toward the dormitory.
あ、あの！ ちょっとマーケットに寄っていきませんか？<br>美味しそうな屋台を見:
Ah, um! Would you like to stop by the Market?
I found a food stall that looks delicious!
ヒナギは、宿舎までの道のりが意外と短いことに気が付き、<br>思い付きで咄嗟にそ:
Hinagi realized the walk to the dormitory was surprisingly short, and
on a whim, she blurted out that suggestion.
そうだな。<br>ちょうど腹も減ったし、寄っていくか。: Yeah. I'm getting hungry too, so let's stop by.
２人は手を繋いだまま、マーケットへと向かっていく。<br>ヒナギは繋いだ手から伝:
The two of them headed to the Market, still holding hands. Feeling
that warmth, Hinagi had made up her mind—
（うん。私、決めた……。<br>この場所で、この人と、生きていこう――）: (Yes. I've decided... I'm going to live here, with this person—)
